official_body: Department of Industrial and Employment Relations (DIER)
text_value: 2026 National Minimum Wage: EUR 229.44/week. Revised 2026 wage received by employee with COLA shown on source page: EUR 226.66/week.
notes: Official Malta national minimum wage reference. Use EUR 229.44/week as statutory wage floor; keep COLA-related employee-received figure only as contextual note.
benchmark_use_case: Use as wage-floor anchor in labor cost calibration.
comparator_note: Official statutory source; no market comparator needed for baseline floor.
fit_for_modeling_note: Ready for modeling as minimum legal wage floor.
